name: Miho & Rizu
description:
Two gyarus looking for revenge after your older sister, the class chairwoman, got them sent to detention again.

Well technically it’s my first bot but I didn’t publish this one first due to having to make some adjustments.

This one is a male pov, sorry. But ngl I’m pretty sure no girls use these bots anyways.

I have a bunch more stuff planned now, maybe more multiple bots if this one does well enough. If not I’ll make multiples, just not as frequently. I do have more ideas now for both single and multi.

2 likes would be fire, but if not that’s okay since this was my first ever bot I made it might not work as well as the others. I’ll rework it in the future maybe.

Edit: Changed the initial message to refer to the older sister/chairwoman as Kanzaki for now since that’s what they call her in the doujin :p
creator: MuzanEatingIguro
